environment.estimated_tree_compute_budget_source: os.cpu_count approximation of available_parallelism - 2 policy; not the binary's reported effective pool size

collector.order: direct-relay on odd runs; relay-direct on even runs

cold_start.direct_command: env -i PATH="$PATH" TMPDIR="$TMPDIR" LANG=C.UTF-8 LC_ALL=C.UTF-8 python3 benches/profile/drive.py --bin /Users/atusy/ghq/github.com/atusy/kakehashi___worker_adr/target/release/kakehashi --data-dir /tmp/kakehashi-phase0-data.WIU8dk --lang rust --size 15 --requests 1 --settle 0 >/dev/null 2>&1
cold_start.relay_command: env -i PATH="$PATH" TMPDIR="$TMPDIR" LANG=C.UTF-8 LC_ALL=C.UTF-8 KAKEHASHI_WORKER_PROXY_BIN=/Users/atusy/ghq/github.com/atusy/kakehashi___worker_adr/target/release/kakehashi python3 benches/profile/drive.py --bin python3 --server-arg benches/profile/worker_proxy.py --data-dir /tmp/kakehashi-phase0-data.WIU8dk --lang rust --size 15 --requests 1 --settle 0 >/dev/null 2>&1
cold_start.order: 20 direct runs followed by 20 relay runs; not interleaved

artifacts.verification: parser metadata and every installed query byte-matched
